commit.message:
BD-01: Restore governance trace continuity — forward traceId through gateway to apex_lessons

- storeMemory() now accepts optional traceId parameter
- traceId forwarded from storeMemory() layer-10 branch to _storeLesson()
- _storeLesson() writes traceId ?? trace-${taskId} to apex_lessons.trace_id
- obsidian-memory.logLesson() passes caller-supplied traceId into gateway

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
